description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the griest/karma-full-test-env:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs yarn install and a cache of node_modules/. Define three stages (build, test, deploy) and a build job that runs npm run build, stores the dist/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on tags and the master branch. Add a docs job in the build stage that runs npm run docs, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and also runs only on tags and master. Include a test job in the test stage that executes ./node_modules/.bin/cross-env FD_PASS=$FD_PASS npm run test -- --single-run --browsers Chrome followed by mv public/reports/lcov-report public/reports/coverage, and saves the public/ folder as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that echoes "Building Pages", depends on test and docs, publishes the public/ artifact and runs only on the master branch, and a publish job that writes the NPM auth token to ~/.npmrc, runs npm publish, depends on build, docs, and test, and runs only on tags.
